title: Better Trim Recipes
description:
Adds New Recipes for the Armour Trims of 1.20.1



This mod was made using MCreator
body:
A mod that adds new Recipes for duplicating the armour trims of 1.20.1 which use materials that are from vanilla minecraft

For example the Silence trim's new recipce where it require cobbled deepslate blocks, skulk blocks and one diamond and the trim it'self

![The Silence Trim for Example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3f833a278db17895fa59e8a6a7be00269b6e16b4.png)

This mod will add recipce for the following trims

1. Dune
2. Wayfinder
3. Raiser
4. Shaper
5. Host
6. Ward
7. Silence
8. Tide
9. Snout
10. Rib
11. Eye
12. Spire
13. Coast
14. Wild
15. Vex
16. Sentry




This mod was made using MCreator
